rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow sending an SMS from any phone to locate the device.
The system shall change the sound profile of the phone from silent to normal via SMS without requiring internet access.
The system shall enable tracking the device using an SMS.
The system shall allow remote access to the device without requiring internet connectivity.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Send an SMS from any phone to locate your device
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: All you need to do is just send an SMS to your mobile number from any phone that you have access to...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Change the sound profile of your phone (silent to normal) via SMS without Internet
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...an SMS can help you change the sound profile of your phone (silent to normal) without Internet.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Track your phone through an SMS
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Track your phone through an SMS

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Access your device remotely without Internet
